message:
Add signature drift gate module (RGC-617C dependency-safe prework)

Implements signature-drift and transition-budget compliance gating for
adaptive performance claims. Gates claims on L1/L∞ drift thresholds,
transition budget consumption, regime change detection, baseline
staleness, and observation sufficiency.

Key types: SignatureSnapshot, DriftMeasurement, TransitionBudgetTracker,
DriftGateConfig, GateVerdict (Pass/Downgrade/Block/Abstain),
GateDecision, BatchGateResult, ClaimScopeLedger.

45 unit tests, all passing. Evidence corpus with 7 specimen families.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
